# C4 Architecture Platform — Implementation Guide

---

# Part 1 — What We're Building

A visual C4 architecture platform where users model software systems, create diagrams, build reusable architecture blocks, and share them with the community. Everything happens through the UI — users never write code.

## C4 Scope

**Level 1 — System Context**: Persons and systems.
**Level 2 — Container**: Persons, systems, and containers.
**Level 3 — Component**: Persons, systems, containers, and components.
**Level 4 — Code**: Out of scope. Autogenerated UML from source code — not what this platform does.

## Hierarchy Rules (enforced)

```
Person      → no parent
System      → no parent (or parent is another System for grouping)
Container   → parent must be a System
Component   → parent must be a Container
```

## Diagram Scope Rules

| Diagram level | Can contain | Scope element |
|---|---|---|
| `context` | Persons, Systems | null or a System |
| `container` | Persons, Systems, Containers | must be a System |
| `component` | Persons, Systems, Containers, Components | must be a Container |

---

# Part 2 — Tech Stack

## Core Framework

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| Framework | TanStack Start (Vite-based, SSR, server functions) |
| Router | TanStack Router (file-based, fully type-safe) |
| Language | TypeScript |
| UI | React |

## TanStack Libraries (9 total)

| Library | What it does in this project |
|---|---|
| **Start** | Full-stack framework: SSR, server functions, Vite bundling |
| **Router** | Type-safe file-based routing, loaders, search params, `beforeLoad` guards |
| **Query** | Server state management, SWR caching, mutations, optimistic updates |
| **Form** | Every form in the app: auth, CRUD, settings, block install, admin |
| **Table** | Every data table: users, members, elements, diagrams, activity, blocks |
| **Virtual** | Virtualized rendering for large lists: element trees, activity feeds |
| **Pacer** | Debouncing (autosave, search), throttling (canvas drag), rate limiting |
| **Hotkeys** | Keyboard shortcuts for the diagram editor |
| **Devtools** | Unified debug panel in development (Router + Query + Form + Pacer tabs) |

## UI & Styling

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| CSS | Tailwind CSS |
| Components | shadcn/ui |
| Icons (default) | Lucide React |
| Icons (brands) | Simple Icons |
| Icons (custom) | Sanitized SVG upload |
| Validation | Zod (used by Form, Router, server functions) |

## State Management

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| Server state | TanStack Query |
| Editor state | Zustand (undo/redo stacks, selection, drag, clipboard) |

## Database

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| Database | PostgreSQL 16 |
| ORM | Drizzle ORM |
| Driver | `node-postgres` (`pg`) with optional `pg-native` |

## Authentication

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| Framework | Better Auth with Drizzle adapter (`pg` provider) |
| TanStack integration | `tanstackStartCookies` plugin |
| Social providers | GitHub, Microsoft (Entra ID), Google |
| Platform admin | Better Auth Admin plugin |
| Org & RBAC | Better Auth Organization plugin (with teams) |
| Two-factor | Better Auth 2FA plugin (TOTP + OTP) |
| Passwordless | Better Auth Email OTP plugin |
| Password security | Better Auth Have I Been Pwned plugin |
| Login tracking | Better Auth Last Login Method plugin |

## Block Distribution

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| Official blocks | JSON files in `/blocks/official` |
| Community blocks | JSON files in creator's GitHub repos |
| Registry | Separate GitHub repo with CI validation |
| Fetching | GitHub REST API |

## Export & Deployment

| Concern | Technology |
|---|---|
| PNG export | `sharp` or `resvg` (SVG → PNG) |
| SVG export | Direct canvas export |
| Containerization | Docker / Podman |
| Orchestration | `compose.yaml` (app + db) |

---

# Part 3 — Where Each TanStack Library Is Used

## TanStack Form — every form

| Form | Location |
|---|---|
| Sign up | email, name, password |
| Sign in | email, password |
| Password reset | email, new password |
| 2FA setup | TOTP code verification |
| Create organization | name, slug, logo |
| Org settings | name, slug, logo, metadata |
| Invite member | email, role picker |
| Create workspace | name, slug, description, icon |
| Workspace settings | name, slug, description |
| Create element | type, name, description, technology, parent |
| Edit element | inline editing panel |
| Create relationship | source, target, description, technology |
| Create diagram | level, name, scope element |
| Diagram settings | name, description, grid, snap |
| Block install | dynamic inputs from block.json |
| "Save as Block" export | name, summary, description, icon, tags |
| Admin: create user | email, name, password, role |
| Admin: ban user | reason, expiry |

## TanStack Table — every data list

| Table | Features |
|---|---|
| Admin user list | search, filter, sort, pagination |
| Org members | role column, actions |
| Workspace elements | name, type, technology, inline actions |
| Workspace relationships | source, target, description |
| Diagram list | name, level, status, revision count |
| Activity log | user, action, entity, timestamp |
| Block browser | name, type, source, category, tags |
| Revision history | number, note, author, date |

## TanStack Virtual — large scrollable lists

| List | Why virtualize |
|---|---|
| Element tree sidebar | Hundreds of nested elements |
| Activity feed | Unbounded, grows over time |
| Revision history | Long-lived diagrams |
| Block browser results | Hundreds of community blocks |
| Admin user list | Platform-wide, thousands |

## TanStack Pacer — timing control

| Use case | Primitive | Config |
|---|---|---|
| Autosave (diagram) | debounce | 1500ms trailing |
| Search input | debounce | 300ms |
| Undo snapshots | debounce | 300ms |
| Canvas drag | throttle | 16ms (60fps) |
| GitHub API calls | rate limit | Per API limits |
| Multi-element batch save | batch | 500ms or 10 items |

## TanStack Hotkeys — keyboard shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl/Cmd+Z` | Undo |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+C` | Copy selected |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+V` | Paste |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+A` | Select all |
| `Delete` / `Backspace` | Delete selected |
| `Escape` | Deselect / cancel |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+S` | Force save |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+G` | Toggle grid |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+L` | Toggle lock |
| `Space` (hold) | Pan mode |
| `+` / `-` | Zoom in/out |
| `Ctrl/Cmd+0` | Reset zoom |
| `?` | Show shortcuts overlay |

## TanStack Devtools — development debug panel

Single `<TanStackDevtools />` in root layout with plugins for Router, Query, Form, and Pacer. Dev-only, tree-shaken from production.

---

# Part 4 — Access Control

## Two-tier model

**Platform level** (Better Auth Admin plugin): Platform admins manage ALL users — create, list, search, ban/unban, impersonate, revoke sessions, reset passwords, delete accounts.

**Organization level** (Better Auth Organization plugin): Controls what users can do within their org's workspaces.

The two tiers are independent. Platform admin without org membership can't access workspaces. Org owner without platform admin can't access admin dashboard. Only bridge: impersonation.

## Organization → Workspace hierarchy

```
Organization (Better Auth)
├── Members (roles: owner / admin / editor / viewer)
├── Teams (optional subgroups)
└── Workspaces (your app)
    ├── Elements, Relationships
    ├── Diagrams (Revisions, Diagram Elements, Diagram Relationships)
    └── Block Installations
```

## Permissions

| Permission | Owner | Admin | Editor | Viewer |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Org: update, delete | All | All except delete | — | — |
| Members: create, update, delete | All | All | — | — |
| Workspace: create, delete, archive | ✓ | ✓ | — | — |
| Workspace: read, update | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Read only |
| Element/Relationship: CRUD | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Read only |
| Diagram: CRUD | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Read only |
| Diagram: approve, archive | ✓ | ✓ | — | — |
| Block: install, export | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — |
| Block: browse | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

---

# Part 5 — Better Auth + TanStack Start Wiring

## Auth route handler

```typescript
// src/routes/api/auth/$.ts
import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";

export const Route = createFileRoute("/api/auth/$")({
  server: {
    handlers: {
      GET: async ({ request }: { request: Request }) => auth.handler(request),
      POST: async ({ request }: { request: Request }) => auth.handler(request),
    },
  },
});
```

## Session helpers

```typescript
// src/lib/auth.server.ts
import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
import { getRequestHeaders } from "@tanstack/react-start/server";
import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";

export const getSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  const headers = getRequestHeaders();
  return auth.api.getSession({ headers });
});

export const ensureSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  const headers = getRequestHeaders();
  const session = await auth.api.getSession({ headers });
  if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  return session;
});
```

## Route protection (pathless layout)

```typescript
// src/routes/_protected.tsx
import { createFileRoute, redirect, Outlet } from "@tanstack/react-router";
import { getSession } from "@/lib/auth.server";

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_protected")({
  beforeLoad: async ({ location }) => {
    const session = await getSession();
    if (!session) {
      throw redirect({ to: "/login", search: { redirect: location.href } });
    }
    return { user: session.user, session };
  },
  component: () => <Outlet />,
});
```

## Server auth config

```typescript
// src/lib/auth.ts
import { betterAuth } from "better-auth";
import { drizzleAdapter } from "better-auth/adapters/drizzle";
import { tanstackStartCookies } from "better-auth/tanstack-start";
import { admin, organization, twoFactor, emailOTP, haveibeenpwned, lastLoginMethod } from "better-auth/plugins";
import { db } from "./database";
import { platformAc, platformAdmin, platformUser, orgAc, orgOwner, orgAdmin, orgEditor, orgViewer } from "./permissions";

export const auth = betterAuth({
  appName: "C4 Platform",
  database: drizzleAdapter(db, { provider: "pg", usePlural: true }),
  emailAndPassword: {
    enabled: true,
    requireEmailVerification: true,
    minPasswordLength: 10,
    customSyntheticUser: ({ coreFields, additionalFields, id }) => ({
      ...coreFields, role: "user", banned: false, banReason: null, banExpires: null,
      ...additionalFields, id,
    }),
    sendResetPassword: async ({ user, url, token }, request) => { /* send email */ },
    sendVerificationEmail: async ({ user, url, token }, request) => { /* send email */ },
  },
  socialProviders: {
    github: { clientId: process.env.GITHUB_CLIENT_ID!, clientSecret: process.env.GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET! },
    microsoft: { clientId: process.env.MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID!, clientSecret: process.env.MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET!, tenantId: "common" },
    google: { clientId: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID!, clientSecret: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET! },
  },
  plugins: [
    admin({ ac: platformAc, roles: { admin: platformAdmin, user: platformUser }, defaultRole: "user" }),
    organization({
      ac: orgAc, roles: { owner: orgOwner, admin: orgAdmin, editor: orgEditor, viewer: orgViewer },
      teams: { enabled: true }, requireEmailVerificationOnInvitation: true,
      async sendInvitationEmail(data) { /* send email */ },
    }),
    twoFactor(),
    emailOTP({ async sendVerificationOTP({ email, otp, type }) { /* send email */ } }),
    haveibeenpwned(),
    lastLoginMethod(),
    tanstackStartCookies(), // MUST be last
  ],
});
```

## Client auth config

```typescript
// src/lib/auth-client.ts
import { createAuthClient } from "better-auth/client";
import { adminClient, organizationClient, twoFactorClient, emailOTPClient, lastLoginMethodClient } from "better-auth/client/plugins";
import { platformAc, platformAdmin, platformUser, orgAc, orgOwner, orgAdmin, orgEditor, orgViewer } from "./permissions";

export const authClient = createAuthClient({
  plugins: [
    adminClient({ ac: platformAc, roles: { admin: platformAdmin, user: platformUser } }),
    organizationClient({ ac: orgAc, roles: { owner: orgOwner, admin: orgAdmin, editor: orgEditor, viewer: orgViewer }, teams: { enabled: true } }),
    twoFactorClient(), emailOTPClient(), lastLoginMethodClient(),
  ],
});
```

## Permissions

```typescript
// src/lib/permissions.ts
import { createAccessControl } from "better-auth/plugins/access";
import { defaultStatements as adminDefaults, adminAc } from "better-auth/plugins/admin/access";
import { defaultStatements as orgDefaults, ownerAc, adminAc as orgAdminAc, memberAc } from "better-auth/plugins/organization/access";

// Platform level
const platformStatement = { ...adminDefaults } as const;
export const platformAc = createAccessControl(platformStatement);
export const platformAdmin = platformAc.newRole({ ...adminAc.statements });
export const platformUser = platformAc.newRole({});

// Organization level
const orgStatement = {
  ...orgDefaults,
  workspace: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "archive"],
  element: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  relationship: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  diagram: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "approve", "archive"],
  block: ["browse", "install", "export"],
} as const;

export const orgAc = createAccessControl(orgStatement);

export const orgOwner = orgAc.newRole({
  ...ownerAc.statements,
  workspace: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "archive"],
  element: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  relationship: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  diagram: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "approve", "archive"],
  block: ["browse", "install", "export"],
});

export const orgAdmin = orgAc.newRole({
  ...orgAdminAc.statements,
  workspace: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "archive"],
  element: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  relationship: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  diagram: ["create", "read", "update", "delete", "approve", "archive"],
  block: ["browse", "install", "export"],
});

export const orgEditor = orgAc.newRole({
  workspace: ["read", "update"],
  element: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  relationship: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  diagram: ["create", "read", "update", "delete"],
  block: ["browse", "install", "export"],
});

export const orgViewer = orgAc.newRole({
  workspace: ["read"],
  element: ["read"],
  relationship: ["read"],
  diagram: ["read"],
  block: ["browse"],
});
```

## Database connection

```typescript
// src/lib/database.ts
import { drizzle } from "drizzle-orm/node-postgres";
import { Pool } from "pg";
import * as schema from "./schema";

const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL });
export const db = drizzle(pool, { schema });
```

# Part 6 — Database Tables

## Better Auth tables (~11, auto-generated)

| Table | Key fields |
|---|---|
| `user` | id, name, email, emailVerified, image, role, banned, banReason, banExpires |
| `account` | userId, providerId, accountId |
| `session` | userId, token, expiresAt, activeOrganizationId, activeTeamId, impersonatedBy |
| `verification` | identifier, value, expiresAt |
| `organization` | id, name, slug, logo, metadata |
| `member` | userId, organizationId, role |
| `invitation` | email, inviterId, organizationId, role, status, expiresAt |
| `team` | id, name, organizationId |
| `teamMember` | teamId, userId |
| `twoFactor` | userId, secret, backupCodes |

## Application tables (12)

### `workspaces`

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | uuid | pk |
| `organization_id` | text | fk → organization |
| `name` | text | |
| `slug` | text | unique within org |
| `description` | text | nullable |
| `status` | text | `active`, `archived` |
| `icon_emoji` | text | nullable |
| `settings_json` | jsonb | |
| `created_by` | text | user id |
| `deleted_at` | timestamp | nullable |
| `created_at` | timestamp | |
| `updated_at` | timestamp | |

---

# Part 7 — Block System

## One schema per C4 level

| Block type | Creates | Install target |
|---|---|---|
| **System Block** | Systems + Containers + Components + Relationships + Diagrams | Top-level (no picker) |
| **Container Block** | Containers + Components + Relationships | User picks target System |
| **Component Block** | Components + Relationships | User picks target Container |

## System Block — self-contained, no `element_ref` inputs

```json
{
  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
  "block_type": "system",
  "name": "nextjs-postgres-starter",
  "display_name": "Next.js + PostgreSQL Starter",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "summary": "Standard web app with Next.js, API, and PostgreSQL.",
  "icon": { "source": "simple-icons", "name": "nextdotjs" },
  "tags": ["starter", "nextjs", "postgres"],
  "category": "starter",
  "inputs": [
    { "key": "system_name", "label": "System Name", "type": "text", "default": "My Application", "required": true },
    { "key": "include_cache", "label": "Include Redis cache?", "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    { "key": "db_technology", "label": "Database", "type": "select", "options": ["PostgreSQL", "MySQL", "SQLite"], "default": "PostgreSQL" }
  ],
  "elements": [
    { "template_key": "user", "element_type": "person", "name": "User", "description": "A user of {{system_name}}", "external": true },
    { "template_key": "system", "element_type": "system", "name": "{{system_name}}", "description": "The main application system" },
    { "template_key": "web_app", "element_type": "container", "name": "Web Application", "technology": "Next.js / React", "parent_template_key": "system" },
    { "template_key": "api", "element_type": "container", "name": "API Server", "technology": "Next.js API Routes", "parent_template_key": "system" },
    { "template_key": "database", "element_type": "container", "name": "Database", "technology": "{{db_technology}}", "parent_template_key": "system" },
    { "template_key": "cache", "element_type": "container", "name": "Cache", "technology": "Redis", "parent_template_key": "system", "conditional_on": "include_cache" }
  ],
  "relationships": [
    { "source": "user", "target": "web_app", "description": "Uses", "technology": "HTTPS" },
    { "source": "web_app", "target": "api", "description": "Makes API calls to", "technology": "HTTPS / JSON" },
    { "source": "api", "target": "database", "description": "Reads from and writes to", "technology": "SQL" },
    { "source": "api", "target": "cache", "description": "Caches data in", "technology": "Redis protocol", "conditional_on": "include_cache" }
  ],
  "diagrams": [
    {
      "name": "System Context", "diagram_level": "context", "scope_element": "system",
      "elements": [
        { "template_key": "user", "x": 400, "y": 50, "width": 200, "height": 200 },
        { "template_key": "system", "x": 300, "y": 350, "width": 400, "height": 300 }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Container Block — requires `element_ref` for target system

Allowed elements: `container`, `component`. Must have exactly one `element_ref` input with `element_type_filter: "system"`.

## Component Block — requires `element_ref` for target container

Allowed elements: `component` only. Must have exactly one `element_ref` input with `element_type_filter: "container"`.

## Input types

| Type | UI | Allowed in |
|---|---|---|
| `text` | Text input | All blocks |
| `boolean` | Toggle | All blocks |
| `select` | Dropdown | All blocks |
| `number` | Number input | All blocks |
| `element_ref` | Element picker | Container + Component blocks only |

## Template rules

- `{{input_key}}` is the only expression syntax
- `conditional_on` → skip if falsy
- `template_key`: unique, only `a-z`, `0-9`, `_`

## Validation schemas

- `block.base.schema.json` — shared structures
- `system.block.schema.json` — person/system/container/component, no element_ref
- `container.block.schema.json` — container/component, requires system element_ref
- `component.block.schema.json` — component only, requires container element_ref

## Distribution

- Official: `/blocks/official/system/`, `container/`, `component/`
- Community: creator's GitHub repos
- Registry: `your-org/block-registry` with CI validation → `index.json`
- App fetches `index.json` via GitHub API, caches 15-min TTL

## "Save as Block"

Select on diagram → detect type → TanStack Form modal → generate `block.json` → download.

---

# Part 8 — Editor Architecture

## Zustand store

```typescript
interface EditorState {
  selectedElementIds: Set<string>;
  selectedRelationshipIds: Set<string>;
  selectionBox: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number } | null;
  undoStack: DiagramSnapshot[];
  redoStack: DiagramSnapshot[];
  clipboard: { elements: DiagramElement[]; relationships: DiagramRelationship[] } | null;
  mode: "select" | "pan" | "add_element" | "add_relationship";
  addElementType: ElementType | null;
  dragState: DragState | null;
}
```

- Undo snapshots: captured via TanStack Pacer debounce (300ms)
- Canvas drag: throttled via Pacer (16ms / 60fps)
- Autosave: debounced via Pacer (1500ms) → TanStack Query mutation
- Keyboard shortcuts: TanStack Hotkeys

## Diagram lifecycle

`draft → in_review → approved → archived`. Only owner/admin can approve.

## Diagram versioning

Revision numbers. Immutable `snapshot_json` per revision.

## Soft delete

`deleted_at` on elements, relationships, diagrams, revisions, workspaces. Filter `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL` by default.

---

# Part 9 — Code Patterns

## Server function with Zod validation

```typescript
import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
import { z } from "zod";
import { ensureSession } from "@/lib/auth.server";

export const createElement = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  .validator(z.object({
    workspaceId: z.string().uuid(),
    elementType: z.enum(["person", "system", "container", "component"]),
    name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
    description: z.string().optional(),
    technology: z.string().optional(),
    parentElementId: z.string().uuid().optional(),
  }))
  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
    const session = await ensureSession();
    // Check org permission, validate hierarchy, insert
    return db.insert(elements).values({ ...data, createdBy: session.user.id }).returning();
  });
```

## TanStack Form with shadcn/ui

```tsx
import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";

function CreateElementForm({ workspaceId }: { workspaceId: string }) {
  const form = useForm({
    defaultValues: { name: "", elementType: "system" as const, description: "", technology: "" },
    onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
      await createElement({ data: { ...value, workspaceId } });
    },
  });

  return (
    <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); form.handleSubmit(); }}>
      <form.Field
        name="name"
        validators={{ onChange: ({ value }) => !value ? "Required" : undefined }}
        children={(field) => (
          <>
            <Label htmlFor={field.name}>Name</Label>
            <Input id={field.name} value={field.state.value} onBlur={field.handleBlur}
              onChange={(e) => field.handleChange(e.target.value)} />
          </>
        )}
      />
      <form.Subscribe selector={(s) => [s.canSubmit, s.isSubmitting]}
        children={([can, loading]) => (
          <Button type="submit" disabled={!can}>{loading ? "Creating..." : "Create"}</Button>
        )}
      />
    </form>
  );
}
```

## TanStack Table with sorting/filtering

```tsx
import { useReactTable, getCoreRowModel, getSortedRowModel, getFilteredRowModel, getPaginationRowModel } from "@tanstack/react-table";

function ElementsTable({ elements }: { elements: Element[] }) {
  const table = useReactTable({
    data: elements,
    columns: [
      { accessorKey: "name", header: "Name" },
      { accessorKey: "elementType", header: "Type" },
      { accessorKey: "technology", header: "Technology" },
      { id: "actions", cell: ({ row }) => <ElementActions element={row.original} /> },
    ],
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
    getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
  });
  // Render with shadcn/ui Table components
}
```

## TanStack Virtual for element tree

```tsx
import { useVirtualizer } from "@tanstack/react-virtual";

function ElementTree({ elements }: { elements: FlatElement[] }) {
  const parentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const virtualizer = useVirtualizer({
    count: elements.length,
    getScrollElement: () => parentRef.current,
    estimateSize: () => 36,
  });

  return (
    <div ref={parentRef} className="h-full overflow-auto">
      <div style={{ height: virtualizer.getTotalSize(), position: "relative" }}>
        {virtualizer.getVirtualItems().map((vi) => (
          <div key={elements[vi.index].id}
            style={{ position: "absolute", top: vi.start, height: vi.size, width: "100%" }}>
            <ElementTreeItem element={elements[vi.index]} />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## TanStack Pacer autosave

```tsx
import { useDebouncedCallback } from "@tanstack/react-pacer";

function DiagramEditor({ diagramId }: { diagramId: string }) {
  const save = useMutation({ mutationFn: saveDiagramElements });
  const debouncedSave = useDebouncedCallback(
    (els: DiagramElement[]) => save.mutate({ diagramId, elements: els }),
    { wait: 1500 }
  );

  const handleMove = (id: string, x: number, y: number) => {
    editorStore.moveElement(id, x, y);
    debouncedSave(editorStore.getElements());
  };
}
```

## TanStack Hotkeys

```tsx
import { useHotkeys } from "@tanstack/react-hotkeys";

function DiagramCanvas() {
  useHotkeys([
    [["ctrl+z", "meta+z"], () => editorStore.undo()],
    [["ctrl+shift+z", "meta+shift+z"], () => editorStore.redo()],
    [["ctrl+c", "meta+c"], () => editorStore.copySelection()],
    [["ctrl+v", "meta+v"], () => editorStore.paste()],
    [["delete", "backspace"], () => editorStore.deleteSelection()],
    [["escape"], () => editorStore.deselect()],
    [["+", "="], () => editorStore.zoomIn()],
    [["-"], () => editorStore.zoomOut()],
  ]);
}
```

## Type-safe search params

```typescript
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";
import { z } from "zod";

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_protected/workspace/$workspaceSlug/blocks")({
  validateSearch: z.object({
    type: z.enum(["system", "container", "component"]).optional(),
    category: z.string().optional(),
    search: z.string().optional(),
    page: z.number().default(1),
  }),
  component: BlockBrowser,
});

function BlockBrowser() {
  const { type, category, search, page } = Route.useSearch(); // Fully typed
}
```

# Part 10 — Project Structure

```
src/
├── routes/
│   ├── __root.tsx                          # Providers, TanStack Devtools
│   ├── index.tsx                           # Landing
│   ├── login.tsx
│   ├── signup.tsx
│   ├── verify-email.tsx
│   ├── reset-password.tsx
│   ├── api/auth/$.ts                       # Better Auth handler
│   ├── _protected.tsx                      # Auth guard layout
│   ├── _protected/
│   │   ├── onboarding.tsx                  # Create first org
│   │   ├── settings.tsx                    # User settings, 2FA
│   │   ├── admin/
│   │   │   ├── users.tsx                   # TanStack Table + Virtual
│   │   │   └── user.$userId.tsx
│   │   ├── org/
│   │   │   ├── settings.tsx
│   │   │   ├── members.tsx                 # TanStack Table
│   │   │   └── teams.tsx
│   │   └── workspace/
│   │       └── $workspaceSlug/
│   │           ├── index.tsx               # Dashboard
│   │           ├── elements.tsx            # Table + Virtual tree
│   │           ├── diagrams.tsx            # Table
│   │           ├── diagram.$diagramId.tsx  # Canvas (Zustand + Hotkeys + Pacer)
│   │           ├── blocks.tsx              # Table + typed search
│   │           ├── activity.tsx            # Table + Virtual
│   │           └── settings.tsx
├── lib/
│   ├── auth.ts                             # Better Auth server
│   ├── auth-client.ts                      # Better Auth client
│   ├── auth.server.ts                      # Session helpers
│   ├── permissions.ts                      # RBAC definitions
│   ├── database.ts                         # Drizzle + pg
│   ├── schema/                             # Drizzle table schemas
│   ├── server/                             # Server functions
│   └── blocks/schemas/                     # Block Zod validation
├── components/
│   ├── editor/                             # Canvas components
│   ├── blocks/                             # Browser, install
│   ├── admin/                              # Admin UI
│   ├── forms/                              # Reusable form patterns
│   ├── tables/                             # Column definitions
│   └── ui/                                 # shadcn/ui
├── stores/
│   └── editor-store.ts                     # Zustand
└── styles/
    └── globals.css
blocks/official/
  ├── system/
  ├── container/
  └── component/
```

# Part 11 — Deployment

```yaml
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    env_file: .env
    depends_on:
      - db
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=c4platform
      - POSTGRES_USER=c4user
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=c4pass
volumes:
  pgdata:
```

```bash
# .env.example
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=generate-32-char-minimum
DATABASE_URL=postgres://c4user:c4pass@db:5432/c4platform
GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=
MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET=
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
GITHUB_PAT=ghp_...
REGISTRY_REPO=your-org/block-registry
SMTP_HOST=
SMTP_PORT=
SMTP_USER=
SMTP_PASS=
EMAIL_FROM=noreply@yourplatform.com
ADMIN_USER_IDS=
```

---

# Part 12 — Implementation Phases

## Phase 1: Foundation (weeks 1–3)

**Goal**: Users sign up, platform admins manage users, organizations work, workspaces exist.

### Infrastructure
- Scaffold with `npm create @tanstack/start` (Better Auth addon)
- Install all TanStack libs: Form, Table, Virtual, Pacer, Hotkeys, Devtools
- Configure Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Set up Drizzle ORM + `node-postgres`
- Configure Better Auth (all plugins + `tanstackStartCookies`)
- Set up TanStack Devtools in `__root.tsx`
- `npx auth generate` → Drizzle migrations
- `Dockerfile`, `compose.yaml`, `.env.example`

### Auth (TanStack Form for all forms)
- Sign up page (email/password + social)
- Sign in page (email/password + social + Email OTP)
- Email verification, password reset
- 2FA setup and challenge
- `_protected.tsx` layout guard

### Platform admin (TanStack Table + Virtual + Form)
- User list with search/filter/sort/pagination
- User detail view
- Ban/unban, impersonate, session management
- Create user, set role, remove user

### Organizations (TanStack Form + Table)
- Create org flow
- Org settings
- Invite member (email + role)
- Members list with role management
- Team creation + membership

### Workspaces (TanStack Form)
- Workspace CRUD (scoped to active org)
- Workspace list in sidebar
- Settings page
- Permission checks on all routes

### Deliverable
Working app: sign up → admin dashboard → create org → invite team → create workspaces.

---

## Phase 2: C4 Elements and Relationships (weeks 4–5)

**Goal**: Users model architecture inside workspaces.

### Build
- `elements`, `relationships`, `tags` Drizzle schemas + migrations
- Server functions with Zod validation for all CRUD
- `validateElementHierarchy()` enforcing C4 rules
- Element tree view (TanStack Virtual)
- Element CRUD forms (TanStack Form)
- Elements table view (TanStack Table)
- Relationship CRUD forms (TanStack Form)
- Relationships table (TanStack Table)
- Tags: CRUD, assignment, filtering

### Deliverable
Full C4 modeling with virtualized lists and type-safe forms.

---

## Phase 3: Diagrams and Canvas Editor (weeks 6–8)

**Goal**: Working visual diagram editor with review workflows.

### Build
- `diagrams`, `diagram_revisions`, `diagram_elements`, `diagram_relationships` schemas
- Diagram CRUD with scope validation
- Canvas: SVG rendering, pan/zoom, grid/snap, drag/resize, z-index
- Multi-select: click, shift-click, selection box
- Relationship rendering: lines, path types, styles, animation, anchors, labels
- **Zustand** editor store: selection, mode, undo/redo, clipboard
- **TanStack Pacer**: autosave (1500ms debounce), drag (16ms throttle), undo snapshots (300ms debounce)
- **TanStack Hotkeys**: all editor keyboard shortcuts
- Diagram settings (TanStack Form)
- Revision history (TanStack Table + Virtual)
- Lifecycle: draft → in_review → approved → archived (permission-gated)

### Deliverable
Full diagram editor with keyboard shortcuts, autosave, and review workflows.

---

## Phase 4: Blocks — Schemas, Official, Install (weeks 9–10)

**Goal**: Level-specific blocks with type-safe install flows.

### Build
- JSON Schemas: base + system + container + component
- Matching Zod schemas + `parseBlock()` dispatcher
- Template/hierarchy/reference validation
- Official blocks (6–8 across all three types)
- Block browser (TanStack Table, type-safe search params)
- Install flow: dynamic TanStack Form generated from block.json inputs
- Element pickers for container/component blocks
- Template resolution engine
- `block_installations` tracking

### Deliverable
Browse and install typed blocks with dynamic forms.

---

## Phase 5: Community Blocks + Export (weeks 11–12)

**Goal**: Community block ecosystem and "Save as Block".

### Build
- Registry repo (`your-org/block-registry`) with CI validation
- GitHub API client + caching (TanStack Pacer rate limiting)
- Combined browser (official + community)
- "Save as Block": select → detect type → TanStack Form modal → generate → download

### Deliverable
Full block ecosystem: browse, install, create.

---

## Phase 6: Polish and Ship (weeks 13–14)

**Goal**: Production-ready.

### Build
- Export: PNG, SVG, JSON workspace, JSON import
- Activity log (TanStack Table + Virtual)
- Full-text search (Pacer-debounced, PostgreSQL tsvector)
- Soft delete + trash UI
- Docker deployment finalization
- Testing: API, block validation (all types), permissions (all roles), editor flows
- Documentation: README, block format spec, contributing guide

### Deliverable
Shippable, self-hosted C4 architecture platform.

---

# Part 13 — Future Considerations

| Technology | When to adopt | What it enables |
|---|---|---|
| **TanStack DB** | When real-time collaboration or large dataset performance becomes a priority | Live queries across elements/relationships, sub-ms reactivity, optimistic mutations at scale |
| **TanStack Store** | When it reaches 1.0 stable | Could replace Zustand for editor state if it adds undo/computed patterns |
| **TanStack AI** | When AI-assisted architecture features are scoped | "Generate C4 from description" or architecture suggestions |
